# Contributing to Keck Marketing & Analytics

Thank you for contributing! Before submitting any artifact — slide deck, dashboard, report, or code — please review our brand guidelines.

## Brand & Design Standards

All visual and written deliverables for Keck Medicine of USC must follow the official brand guidelines:

**[Keck Brand Template](../docs/Keck-Brand-Template.md)**

This covers:
- Color palette (Keck Red, Gold, Olive Green, neutrals, and status indicators)
- Typography (Georgia for headlines, Calibri for body)
- Dashboard and slide sizing rules
- Card and layout design rules
- Key terminology (Big Rock, KRC, ARM, PMOB, etc.)
- File naming conventions

## Quick Checklist

Before opening a PR or submitting a deliverable:

- [ ] Colors match the Keck primary or accent palette
- [ ] Headlines use Georgia; body text uses Calibri
- [ ] Cards have 1px `#E8E6E1` border and 8px border-radius
- [ ] Page/dashboard background is off-white (`#F7F6F2`)
- [ ] Data sources attributed at 9px gray at the bottom of every panel
- [ ] Footer includes navy bar with copyright left
- [ ] File named per convention (`Exec_Session_N_Topic.pptx`, `Dashboard_Name.html`, etc.)
